description: Shared object definitions for skaists performance records. ALPHA: subject to change. All defs in this file are objects, not records; they are designed to be embedded by value, never referenced by URI.

artist.description: Structurally identical to fm.teal.alpha.feed.defs#artist. Field names are intentionally byte-compatible so a teal artist object lifts with zero transformation.

artistMbId.description: The MusicBrainz artist ID URI, formatted as mbid:<uuid>

playRef.description: An embedded copy of a played track. Field names, types, and length limits mirror fm.teal.alpha.feed.defs#playView so a teal playView lifts with zero transformation. REQUIRED SET IS STRICTER than teal's: playedTime is mandatory here because a set is an ordered artifact and teal's ordering falls back to rkey write-order, which diverges from performance order on backfill. A teal playView missing artists or playedTime MUST be rejected at ingest, never synthesized.

artists.description: Array of artists in order of original appearance.

playedTime.description: RFC 3339 time at which this track was brought in. Absolute, not relative to the set. See invariant SET-2.

trackMbId.description: The MusicBrainz ID URI of the track, formatted as mbid:<uuid>

recordingMbId.description: The MusicBrainz recording ID URI, formatted as mbid:<uuid>

duration.description: The length of the track in seconds

releaseMbId.description: The MusicBrainz release ID URI, formatted as mbid:<uuid>

isrc.description: The ISRC code associated with the recording

originUrl.description: The URL associated with this track

musicServiceBaseDomain.description: Base domain of the music service. Defaults to 'local' if unavailable or not provided.

trackDiscriminant.description: Distinguishing information for track variants, e.g. 'Radio Edit', 'Extended Mix', 'Dub'.

transition.description: How a track was brought in over the preceding one. Absent means unknown, not 'cut'.

technique.description: Open vocabulary. Unrecognized values MUST be preserved verbatim, never coerced.

durationMs.description: Length of the transition in milliseconds.

setItem.description: One track within a set, at a fixed ordinal position.

position.description: Zero-based ordinal within the set. Strictly increasing, no gaps. See invariant SET-1.

play.description: The track, embedded by value. NEVER an at-uri to fm.teal.alpha.feed.play. See invariant SET-5.

cueTime.description: Seconds elapsed from set startedAt when this track was brought in. DERIVED and REDUNDANT with playedTime by design; disagreement beyond tolerance is a MISMATCH, not a rounding artifact. See invariant SET-4.

outTime.description: Seconds elapsed from set startedAt when this track was taken out.

bpmMilli.description: Tempo in milli-BPM. 174000 == 174.000 BPM. AT Protocol lexicon v1 has NO float primitive; a fractional BPM cannot be expressed as a number. Do not substitute a string.

musicalKey.description: Camelot wheel notation preferred, e.g. '8A', '11B'. Open vocabulary; preserve verbatim.

transitionIn.description: The transition used to bring this track in. Omitted on position 0.

performer.description: One performer. Agency is declared PER PERFORMER, not per set. 'Mixed' is therefore a derived property of the array and MUST NOT be stored; see SET-4 on derived fields.

kind.description: The agency of this performer. REQUIRED, because disclosure must be affirmative. 'undisclosed' is a sayable value; silence is not. An unrecognized value MUST be rendered as undisclosed and MUST NEVER be defaulted to 'human'. See invariant SET-11.

performerDid.description: AT Protocol identity of the performer, when they have one. A machine performer with a DID is a first-class performer and is named here like any other.

performerMbId.description: MusicBrainz artist ID URI, formatted as mbid:<uuid>

venue.description: Where the performance happened, embedded by value. LOAD-BEARING: a set renders offline from this field alone (SET-8). Field names mirror community.lexicon.location.address so a venue lifts into that def with zero transformation whenever `country` is present. Deliberately NOT a ref to the community.lexicon.location.* union: every def in that union has an OPTIONAL `name`, and a location without a human-readable name cannot carry SET-8's load. Coordinates, H3 cells, and Foursquare ids belong on the event record, reachable via set#eventUri.

name.description: The name of the venue. REQUIRED here, optional in community.lexicon.location.address. A stricter profile, in the same sense that playRef requires playedTime and playView does not.

locality.description: The locality of the region. For example, a city.

region.description: The administrative region of the country. For example, a state.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the location.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. Tighter than community.lexicon.location.address, which permits 2-10 characters. OPTIONAL, and optional on purpose: if `country` were required, a writer who cannot name it would have to omit `venue` entirely and lose the venue NAME too, producing a strictly worse record. Absent `country` costs only interop. See SET-13.

venueUrl.description: skaists extension; no counterpart in community.lexicon.location.address. A venue carrying this field remains liftable — consumers of the address shape ignore it.
